escalation.rationale: Israel's deepest incursion into Lebanon in 26 years with Beaufort Castle capture and Ukrainian strikes on Russian nuclear facility heighten tensions.

ticker_items: Israel crosses Litani River, captures Beaufort Castle in deepest Lebanon incursion since 2000
Ukraine denies striking Russian nuclear plant amid fresh energy facility attacks
Belarus warns any attack would profoundly impact Ukraine conflict nature
Iran reopens underground missile sites, prepares for renewed strikes on Israel
EU considers freezing Russia oil price cap over Middle East war

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drones targeted Russian oil refinery hundreds of kilometers inside Russia.
Russian forces allegedly struck structure at nuclear power plant according to Rosatom.

middle_east.description: Israeli forces captured strategic mountain castle in deepest incursion into Lebanon in 26 years.
Israeli forces destroyed Arch Almoulouk restaurant owned by chef Husen Fayad.
Iranian attack prompted Kuwait to activate air defenses according to foreign ministry.

russia.text: An attack on Belarus from any territory would have a profound impact on the nature of the conflict in Ukraine
russia.speaker: Alexander Lukashenko
russia.title: President of Belarus

middle_east.text: Level Beirut suburbs to the ground
middle_east.speaker: Itamar Ben-Gvir
middle_east.title: Israeli Security Minister

middle_east.text: Tehran will not agree to any deal with the United States unless Iranian rights are fully secured
middle_east.speaker: Iran's chief negotiator
middle_east.title: Chief Negotiator

observers.description: Trump administration reportedly reducing NATO military commitments while maintaining pressure on Iran. US forces disabled vessel violating Hormuz blockade amid ongoing Middle East tensions.
EU considering temporary freeze on Russian oil price cap due to Middle East war. France and UK jointly intercepted Russian oil tanker attempting to skirt international sanctions.

Chinese President Xi reportedly planning state visit to North Korea to reinforce Beijing's influence as North Korea-Russia ties deepen. US-China defense ties described as newly stable by Defense Secretary.

financial.notes: EU consideration of freezing Russian oil price cap creates potential market uncertainty.

update_log.text: Israel captures Beaufort Castle in deepest Lebanon incursion since 2000, crossing Litani River
Iranian attack on Kuwait prompts air defense activation according to Kuwaiti foreign ministry
Ukrainian drones target Russian oil refinery in latest deep-strike campaign
France and UK intercept Russian oil tanker attempting to evade sanctions
